narrative_beat: Wide Saturno dourado com tres figuras imperiais e misseis estilizados

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: the planet Saturn rendered in burnished gold filling the upper frame, with its rings glowing amber, while three small imperial silhouette figures stand below in commanding poses, each with a stylized missile beneath their feet
props: burnished gold Saturn with amber rings

environment.time_of_day: eternal space darkness with planetary glow

composition.foreground: Saturn in rich gold and amber tones, figures in warm silhouette

lighting.key_light: golden planetary glow from Saturn illuminating everything below
lighting.rim_light: amber ring reflection on missile surfaces

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: Saturn as chronos — time god ruling leaders and weapons
symbolism.secondary: missiles as modern swords of Damocles

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
